text.title: Jenkins Basics: Pipeline Examples
text.summary: Declarative pipeline skeleton, Kubernetes agent example, Shared Library definition, parallel test execution.

example.note: Node.js Declarative pipeline using Docker agent with parallel lint and test stages.
Kubernetes pod template with separate containers for build and deployment tools.
Shared Library var definition (vars/standardPipeline.groovy) encapsulating common pipeline logic.

text.reference: Declarative pipeline template with build/test/deploy stages
Kubernetes pod template for dynamic Jenkins agents
